Part.Source: Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PedidosSelecionados.Visible = False &FilCod.Visible = False &EmpCod.Visible = False &AuxPedCod.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &acoesEmGrupoData = new() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem = new() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.Title = 'Imprimir em Grupo' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.EventKey = !'ImprimirSelecionadas' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &acoesEmGrupoData.Add(&acoesEmGrupoDataItem) &acoesEmGrupoDataItem = new() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.Title = 'Faltas dos Pedidos' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.EventKey = !'FaltasPedidos' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &acoesEmGrupoData.Add(&acoesEmGrupoDataItem) &PedSts = nullvalue(&PedSts) &PedStsFin = nullvalue(&PedStsFin) &PedBlq = nullvalue(&PedBlq) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Pedido Venda' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Pedido Decrescente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Pedido Crescente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Pedido') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Emissão') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Estoque') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Previsão') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Faturado') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Bruto') &OrderedBy.AddItem(9, 'Líquido ') &OrderedBy.AddItem(10, 'Lct.') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod EndEvent Event Refresh &PedidosSelecionados = 'SEL_WWPEDIDOVENDA' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'wwPedidoFaturamentoColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'wwPedidoFaturamentoColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf &IsMarcado.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible &ComEstTaxa.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible PedCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible &PedNovCliRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible PedDtaEms.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible &NovoStatus.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible &NovoStatusFinanceiro.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible PedSts.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible PedDtaPrv.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible PedDtaFat.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible &AuxFin.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible PedVlrBrt.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible PedVlrLiq.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(13).IsVisible LctCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(14).IsVisible &Redespacho.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(15).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &ComEstTaxa.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod If &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() and &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() &PedDtaEms_To = serverdate() &PedDtaEms = &PedDtaEms_To - 30 &PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO EndIF RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon010_LiberarCreditoPedido, &LiberaCreditoPedido) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon009_FecharComEstoque, &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon041_FecharIntergradoFinanceiro, &FechamentoIntegradoEstoque) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon165_FaturarComDataEmbalado, &TCon165_FaturarComDataEmbalado) RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPEDIDOFATURAMENTO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) tbStsCrd.Visible = (&LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X') do 'loadSelecionados' if (&LiberaCreditoPedido <> 'S' and &LiberaCreditoPedido <> 'X') &NovoStatusFinanceiro.Visible = false EndIF EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &ComEstTaxa = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NewUpdate = !'' &Acoes.Clear() &Acoes.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO) &Acoes.AddItem(1, 'Abrir Estoque') Endif If ((PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO) and (LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida)) &Acoes.AddItem(2, 'Liberar Estoque') Endif &Acoes.AddItem(3, 'Ref./Ane./Cot.') If ((PedSts in (Status_Pedido.ABERTO, Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO)) and (LctAtuSal <> Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum)) &Acoes.AddItem(4, 'Emitir Nota') Endif If (not PedSts in (Status_Pedido.FECHADO, Status_Pedido.CANCELADO)) &Acoes.AddItem(5, 'Fechar Estoque') Endif &Acoes.AddItem(6, 'Críticas Pedido') If (PedSts <> 'F') &Acoes.AddItem(7, 'Cancelar Pedido') Endif &EnviarEmail = !'' &ImprimirPedido = !'' If PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO RetornaPercentualEstoquePedido.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &BruMoeda, &ComEstMoeda, &SemEstMoeda, &ComEstTaxa) Endif &PedNovCliRaz = iif(PedCliCodRaz_Nov.Length() > 30, Substr(PedCliCodRaz_Nov,1,30)+'...', PedCliCodRaz_Nov) &NovoStatus = trim(PedNovStsNom) &NovoStatusFinanceiro = trim(PedNovStsFinNom) &AuxFin = UPPER(Substr(PedStsFin.EnumerationDescription(), 1,3)) &Redespacho = Substr(PedTraRedCodRaz, 1, 18) Do Case Case PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO &ComEstTaxa.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough WWColumnLineThroughSingleCell' Case &ComEstTaxa <= 50 &ComEstTaxa.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell' Case &ComEstTaxa > 50 and &ComEstTaxa < 90 &ComEstTaxa.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnWarning WWColumnWarningSingleCell' Case &ComEstTaxa >= 90 &ComEstTaxa.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnSuccess WWColumnSuccessSingleCell' Otherwise &ComEstTaxa.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ PedCliCodRaz.Link = VerPedido.Link('wwPedidoFaturamento', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) &IsAutorizado = RetornaIsPodeAlterar.UDP('', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) If &IsAutorizado = false &NewUpdate = !'' &NewUpdate.TooltipText = "Visualizar Pedido" &NewUpdate.Link = VerPedido.Link('wwPedidoFaturamento',EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Else &NewUpdate.TooltipText = "GXM_update" &NewUpdate.Link = PedidoVendas.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, 'PEDIDOFATURAMENTO') Endif &Redespacho.Link = VerCliente.Link('wwPedidoFaturamento', EmpCod, PedTraRedCod) &Redespacho.Tooltiptext = PedTraRedCodRaz If LctTip = TipoLancamento.OrcamentoVenda PedCod.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Else PedCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndIF prcStatusPedidoRGB.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsNom, &R, &G, &B ) &NovoStatus.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) prcStatusPedidoRGB.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsFinNom, &R, &G, &B ) &NovoStatusFinanceiro.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) &AuxPedCod = PedCod &IsMarcado = false do 'IsSelecionado' EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'wwPedidoFaturamentoColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ else &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState.Call(!'wwPedidoFaturamentoColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) wwpedidofaturamento.Link() Endif EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &Acoes.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &Acoes = 1 Do 'Do AbrirEstoquePedido' Case &Acoes = 2 Do 'Do LiberaConformeEstoque' Case &Acoes = 3 Do 'Do RefAnexos' Case &Acoes = 4 Do 'Do EmitirNFe' Case &Acoes = 5 Do 'Do FecharEstoquePedido' Case &Acoes = 6 Do 'Do Criticaspedido' Case &Acoes = 7 Do 'Do CancelarPedido' EndCase &Acoes = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event AbrirEstoquePedido_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpAbrirPedidoVenda.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event AbrirEstoquePedido_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Criticaspedido_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcCriticasDoPedido.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ PedidoVendas.Call(TrnMode.Insert, &EmpCod, &FilCod, 0, 'PEDIDOFATURAMENTO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoTotalizar' RetornaTotalPedidosVendaGrid.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &PedSts, &PedStsFin, &PedCliCod, &PedStsCrd, &PedDtaEms, &PedDtaEms_To, &PedDtaFat1, &PedDtaFat_To1, &LctCod1, &PedVenCod1,'V', &FinMedioMoeda,&medioMoeda,&PedidoMoeda,&QtdPedidos,&FinQtdPedido,&FinPedidoMoeda) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcarTodos' For Each Line &IsMarcado = true &IsAchou = false For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos if &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &IsAchou = true Exit EndIF EndFor if &IsAchou = false &SdtPedidosItem = New() &sdtPedidosItem.EmPCod = EmpCod &sdtPedidosItem.FiLCod = FilCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &SdtPedidos.Add(&sdtPedidosItem) EndIF EndFor do 'txtMarcados' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_acoesEmGrupo.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_acoesEmGrupo.ActiveEventKey = !'ImprimirSelecionadas' Do 'Do ImprimirSelecionadas' Case ddo_acoesEmGrupo.ActiveEventKey = !'FaltasPedidos' Do 'Do FaltasPedidos' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'Dosdd' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpLocalizaNotaPedido.PopUp(&EmpCod, &Pedcod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwwPedidoFaturamento.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportwwPedidoFaturamento.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&IsMarcado", '', !'#', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&ComEstTaxa", '', !'%.Estoq.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedCod", '', !'Pedido', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&PedNovCliRaz", '', !'Razão/Nome Cliente', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaEms", '', !'Emissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&NovoStatus", '', !'Status', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&NovoStatusFinanceiro", '', !'Crédito', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedSts", '', !'Estoque', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaPrv", '', !'Previsão', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaFat", '', !'Faturado', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&AuxFin", '', !'Fin.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedVlrBrt", '', !'Bruto', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedVlrLiq", '', !'Líquido ', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"LctCod", '', !'Lct.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&Redespacho", '', !'Redespacho', True, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'wwPedidoFaturamentoColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = False &PedVenCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = False &PedVenCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = False &PedVenCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AbrirEstoquePedido' If PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAABREESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AbrirEstoquePedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Abrir Estoque Pedido Venda. [VENDAABREESTOQUE]') EndIF Else msg('Opção Disponível somente pedido diferentes de Abertos!') EndiF EndSub Sub 'Do LiberaConformeEstoque' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 &IsClienteComCredito = true do 'VerificaCreditoCliente' if (&LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X') &IsPodeFaturar = RetornaIsPodeFaturar.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIF Do Case Case LctAtuEst <> Status_EntradaSaida.Saida //SOMENTE ATUALIZA ESTOQUE SAIDA msg('Opção não disponível para operações que NÃO atualizam o estoque!') Case PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO //STATUS NAO ABERTO msg('Opção disponível apenas para pedidos com status ABERTO!') Case &IsClienteComCredito = false msg('Crédito do cliente atingido, Solicite liberação de limite crédito para o pedido! [CONF210]') Case (&LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X') and &IsPodeFaturar = false msg('Pedido não liberado para Faturamento! Falta Liberação do Crédito! [CONF23]') Otherwise &IsProdutoEmBalanco = VerificaProdutoEmBalanco.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) If &IsProdutoEmBalanco = true MSG('Pedido este pedido não pode ser Liberado para "SEPARAR", porque têm Itens em Balanço!') else LiberaConformeEstoque.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIf EndCAse Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Estoque Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAESTOQUE]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do RefAnexos' wpReferenciasComerciais.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCliCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do EmitirNFe' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 RetornaConfSistema.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon150_BloquearEmissaoOrcamento, &TCon150_BloquearEmissaoOrcamento) &IsSemEstoque = false If &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' //FECHA PEDIDO SOMENTE COM ESTOQUE &IsSemEstoque = VerificaProdutoSemEstoque.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIf if &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X' &IsPodeFaturar = RetornaIsPodeFaturar.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIF if &TCon165_FaturarComDataEmbalado = 'S' //SOMENTE COM DATA EMBALADO &IsPodeDataEmbalado = RetornaIsPodeFaturarDataEmbalado.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Endif Do Case Case &TCon150_BloquearEmissaoOrcamento <> 'N' and LctTip = TipoLancamento.OrcamentoVenda msg('Bloqueado emissão de Notas à Orçamentos!') Case &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' and &IsSemEstoque = true msg('No pedido existe produtos que não possuem estoque suficiente! [CONF58]') Case (&LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X') and &IsPodeFaturar = false msg('Pedido não liberado para Faturamento! Falta Liberação do Crédito! [CONF23]') Case &TCon165_FaturarComDataEmbalado = 'S' and &IsPodeDataEmbalado <> true msg('Pedido não liberado para Faturamento! Falta passar pela status EMBALADO!') Case LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum msg('Pedido em Operação que não atualiza saldos, não permitido para fazer nota!') Case (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO) And (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO) msg('Somente pedidos com o status estoque "ABERTO" ou "SEPARANDO" pode fazer nota!') Otherwise GravaNotaTemporariaVenda.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, '55') wpSelecionaProdutosNFe.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndCase Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Estoque Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAESTOQUE]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FecharEstoquePedido' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 if not PedSts in (Status_Pedido.FECHADO, Status_Pedido.CANCELADO) &IsClienteComCredito = true do 'VerificaCreditoCliente' // IF LctAtuEst in (Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada, Status_EntradaSaida.Saida) &IsSemEstoque = false If &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' //FECHA PEDIDO SOMENTE COM ESTOQUE &IsSemEstoque = VerificaProdutoSemEstoque.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIf if &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X' &IsPodeFaturar = RetornaIsPodeFaturar.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIF if &TCon165_FaturarComDataEmbalado = 'S' //SOMENTE COM DATA EMBALADO &IsPodeDataEmbalado = RetornaIsPodeFaturarDataEmbalado.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Endif Do Case Case &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' and &IsSemEstoque = true and LctAtuEst in (Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada, Status_EntradaSaida.Saida) msg('No pedido existe produtos que não possuem estoque suficiente! [CONF58]') Case &IsClienteComCredito = false msg('Crédito do cliente atingido, Solicite liberação de limite crédito para o pedido! [CONF210]') Case &FechamentoIntegradoEstoque = 'S' wpFecharPedidoVendaIntegrado.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Case (&LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X') and &IsPodeFaturar = false msg('Pedido não liberado para Faturamento! Falta Liberação do Crédito! [CONF23]') Case &TCon165_FaturarComDataEmbalado = 'S' and &IsPodeDataEmbalado <> true msg('Pedido não liberado para Faturamento! Falta passar pela status EMBALADO!') Otherwise wpFecharPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) grid.Refresh() EndCase // Else // wpFecharPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) // grid.Refresh() // EndIf Else msg('Pedido já Fechado ou Cancelado!') EndIF Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Estoque Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAESTOQUE]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Criticaspedido' // wpCriticasPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Criticaspedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarPedido' If PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO msg('Somente Pedidos Abertos podem ser Cancelados!') Else &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDACANCELARPEDIDO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) RetornaIsPodeAlterar.Call('', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsAutorizado) If &AutNiv > 0 if &IsAutorizado = true wpCancelarPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) grid.Refresh() Else msg('Você não tem acesso para alterar Excluir Pedido nesse Status!') EndIF else msg('Usuário Não Autorizado a Rotina de Cancelar Pedido de Venda. [VENDACANCELARPEDIDO]') endif EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ImprimirSelecionadas' if &SdtPedidos.Count > 0 &WebSession.Set('VARIOSPEDIDOSVENDA', &SdtPedidos.ToJson()) wpImprimirPedidoVenda.Popup(&EmpCod, &FilCod, 0) Else msg('Nenhum pedido para ser impresso!') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FaltasPedidos' wpFaltasVariosPedidos.Link('WWPEDIDOVENDA', &PedidosSelecionados) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTS" &PedSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDNOVSTSCOD" &PedNovStsCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLICOD" &PedCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSFIN" &PedStsFin.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDNOVSTSFINCOD" &PedNovStsFinCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDTRAREDCOD" &PedTraRedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDDTAEMS" &PedDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PedDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTTIP" &LctTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTATUSAL" &LctAtuSal.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDBLQ" &PedBlq.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &PedDtaFat1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PedDtaFat_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' // &FiltroKey = 'FLT#WWPedidoFaturamentoColumnsSelector' // &UmZero = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(&FiltroKey) // Do CAse // Case &UmZero = '2' // &SalvarFiltro = false // Case &UmZero = '1' // &SalvarFiltro = true // Otherwise // RetornaConfUsuario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, domConfUsuario.Uconf001_PadraoFiltro, &UmZero) // if &UmZero = '2' // &SalvarFiltro = false // Else // &SalvarFiltro = true // EndiF // EndCase // // if &SalvarFiltro = true /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCOD", "", not &PedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTS", "", not &PedSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDNOVSTSCOD", "", not &PedNovStsCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedNovStsCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLICOD", "", not &PedCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTSFIN", "", not &PedStsFin.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedStsFin, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDNOVSTSFINCOD", "", not &PedNovStsFinCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedNovStsFinCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDTRAREDCOD", "", not &PedTraRedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedTraRedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDDTAEMS", "", not (&PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &PedDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &PedDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTTIP", "", not &LctTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTATUSAL", "", not &LctAtuSal.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctAtuSal, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDBLQ", "", not &PedBlq.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedBlq, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ // EndIF EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDVENCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDVENCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"PedidoVenda" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &IsMarcado.Click &IsAchou = false If &IsMarcado = true //TRUE For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos if &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &IsAchou = true Exit EndIF EndFor if &IsAchou = false &SdtPedidosItem = New() &sdtPedidosItem.EmPCod = EmpCod &sdtPedidosItem.FiLCod = FilCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &SdtPedidos.Add(&sdtPedidosItem) EndIF Else //FALSE For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos if &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &Index = &sdtPedidos.IndexOf(&sdtPedidosItem) &sdtPedidos.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor EndIf do 'txtMarcados' EndEvent Event limpar_campo.Click &SdtPedidos.Clear() do 'txtMarcados' grid.Refresh() EndEvent Event PedidosSelecionados.Click wpPedidoSelecionado.Popup(&PedidosSelecionados) EndEvent Event &EnviarEmail.Click wpEnviaPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent Event &ImprimirPedido.Click wpImprimirPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent Sub 'txtMarcados' &numeric = &SdtPedidos.Count PedidosSelecionados.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - Pedidos Marcados' padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PedidosSelecionados, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &SdtPedidos.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod) EndSub Sub 'loadSelecionados' padraoUsuario.Call('L', &PedidosSelecionados, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &SdtPedidos.FromJson(&PadObs) do 'txtMarcados' EndSub Sub 'IsSelecionado' &IsMarcado = false For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos If &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = &AuxPedCod &IsMarcado = true EndIf EndFor EndSub Sub 'VerificaCreditoCliente' //Controla Credito do Cliente // If LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria // &DebitoMoeda = RetornaCreditoDisponivelCliente.UDP(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCliCod) // // If (&DebitoMoeda + PedVlrLiq) > PedCliCrd // &ValorLiberadoMoeda = RetornaValorAutorizadoPedido.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedCliCod) // // If &ValorLiberadoMoeda < PedVlrLiq // &IsClienteComCredito = false // EndIF // EndIF // EndIf EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
